structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Fan Speed and SAT Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with heating coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In heating mode, fan speed and SAT setpoint are controlled based on heating loop signal: fan speed resets from MaxHeatSpeed to MinHeatSpeed as signal goes from 100% to 50%, then stays at MinHeatSpeed from 50% to 0%; SAT setpoint is Heat_SAT from 100% to 50%, then resets from Heat_SAT to zone heating setpoint from 50% to 0%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating and there is a heating coil
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: For heating-loop signal 100% to 50%, FANsp resets from MaxHeatSpeed to MinHeatSpeed; for 50% to 0%, FANsp is MinHeatSpeed. For heating-loop signal 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT; for 50% to 0%, SATsp resets from Heat_SAT to active zone heating setpoint. Modulate heating coil with PID to maintain SATsp. Cooling coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If there is a heating coil, when Zone State is Heating 1. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, FANsp is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to MinHeatSpeed. 2. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, FANsp is MinHeatSpeed. 3. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT. 4. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, SATsp is reset from Heat_SAT to the active zone heating setpoint. 5. The heating coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature at SATsp. 6. Cooling coil OFF

evidence_quote: If there is a heating coil, when Zone State is Heating 1. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, FANsp is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to MinHeatSpeed. 2. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, FANsp is MinHeatSpeed. 3. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT. 4. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, SATsp is reset from Heat_SAT to the active zone heating setpoint. 5. The heating coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature at SATsp. 6. Cooling coil OFF
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not verbatim in any chunk

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Fan Speed and Coil Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband mode, fan speed is set to DeadbandSpeed; if DeadbandSpeed is zero, fan shuts off. Both cooling and heating coils are OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set FANsp to DeadbandSpeed; if DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut fan off. Cooling coil OFF. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When Zone State is Deadband 1. FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed. If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off. 2. Cooling coil OFF 3. Heating coil OFF

evidence_quote: When Zone State is Deadband 1. FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed. If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off. 2. Cooling coil OFF 3. Heating coil OFF

structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC #1 Equation ΔOS > ΔOSMAX Applies to OS #1 – #4 Description Too many changes in Operating State Possible Diagnosis Unstable control due to poorly tuned loop or mechanical problem

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#4: Temperature Drop Across Inactive Cooling Coil
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with RAT (cooling only)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when SAT_avg - RAT ≥ sqrt(εRAT^2 + εSAT^2) + ΔTSF in OS#2 for cooling-only FCU with RAT, indicating valve leakage or stuck DX cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#4 Equation SAT AVG – RAT ≥ √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + ΔTSF Applies to OS #2 (cooling only FCU with RAT) Description Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil Possible Diagnosis RAT sensor error SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve stuck open or leaking DX cooling stuck on

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#5: Temperature Rise Across Inactive Heating Coil
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with RAT (heating only)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when SAT_avg - RAT ≤ -sqrt(εRAT^2 + εSAT^2) - ΔTSF in OS#2 for heating-only FCU with RAT, indicating valve leakage or stuck heat.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Valves
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force HW valve full open/closed and CHW valve full open/closed, interlocked at plant level.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify software switches can force HW valve full open, HW valve full closed, CHW valve full open, CHW valve full closed, interlocked at plant level.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: commissioning evidence lacks procedure/check action
